figures.caption: Table 2: Mean normalized return ± standard deviation for offline zero-shot goal-conditioned RL. All experiments are based on eight seeds trained for a total of one million gradient steps. GC-IQL and GC-CQL results are from [24]. Rec-Mid is HILP’s planning method that recursively selects midpoint between current state and goal for three recursions. Sym-Graph stands for graph planning using symmetric Euclidean distances and Asym-Graph for graph planning using asymmetric planning.
Table 4: Comparison of IEL Asymmetric and Symmetric Graph Planning configurations across environments.
Table 3: Main configuration of IEL hyperparameters. Only hyperparameters specific to IEL or Asymmetric/Symmetric Graph Planning differ from those presented in HILP [24].
